products.title: ABOUT AQVO BRAND
products.description: Aqvo is a brand that embodies quality and honesty, specializing in the production of natural food products in Uzbekistan. Each product is carefully selected and meets the highest quality standards.

about.title: About AQVO brand
about.description: AQVO is a brand specialized in producing natural and high-quality food products in Uzbekistan. We use raw materials from local farms and preserve the natural taste and beneficial properties of products using modern technologies. Through quality control at every stage, we provide you with only the best.
